title: AD

title: BC
excerpt: BC stands for “before Christ" and is analogous to BCE

title: BCE
excerpt: Stands for Before Common Era and is used in tandem with CE. BCE analogous to BC.

title: CE
excerpt: Stand for the Common Era and is used in tandem with BCE. CE is analogous to AD.

title: Dark Souls
excerpt: An action RPG series by FromSoftware. It had a huge impact on combat pacing, level design, and challenge philosophy in modern games.

title: Diablo
excerpt: A series of games by Blizzard Entertainment. The earlier entries have reached legendary status in the gaming world while the later entries have been less well received.

title: Dragon Quest
excerpt: A classic Japanese RPG series from Enix (later Square Enix). It helped define turn-based JRPG structure for decades.

title: Elden Ring
excerpt: FromSoftware's open-world action RPG, built in the lineage of Dark Souls. It keeps the same core feel while expanding exploration in a much bigger world.

title: Final Fantasy
excerpt: A long-running JRPG series by Square (now Square Enix). The first one I played was on NES, and it was my first real taste of RPG games.

title: MMO
excerpt: A massively multiplayer online game. Most MMOs were RPG's in their early days, though more and more genres seem to fit into the MMO category as time goes on.

title: Motor City Online
excerpt: An early MMO racing game of sorts. My crew/guild/clan of sorts was The Detroit Lubricators. We had typically held most weekly records on our server.

excerpt: Blizzard's MMO set in the Warcraft universe. For years this was the dominant MMO, and one of the biggest live-service RPG experiences.

excerpt: A movie about AI taking over and ending humanity as we know it.

title: Art Rock
excerpt: An experimental form of rock. My favorite Art Rock bands are Pink Floyd and Radiohead.

title: Borislav Slavov
excerpt: I love the music Borislav Slavov did for DOS2 and BG3. It fits the world and mood perfectly. Rivellon's bass hit around 1:03ish is one of my favorite tracks to test bass response in new speakers/headphones.

title: Christopher Larkin
excerpt: Composer for Hollow Knight and Silksong. His music nails that strange mix of melancholy and wonder. Silksong continued hollow knight's lead of making absolutely beautiful music like Choral Chambers.

title: Christopher Tin
excerpt: Composer behind Baba Yetu and Dream of Flight, both of which are favorites of mine. Baba Yetu was the first game song to win a grammy I believe.

title: Daft Punk
excerpt: Daft Punk has a huge catalog and I keep revisiting albums decades on. Their movie was also a really new way to experience an album.

title: Evan Call
excerpt: Best known to me for his Frieren soundtrack work. Great atmosphere and emotion without being overdone. Some of his songs can move me to tears in the right setting.

title: Howard Shore
excerpt: Howard Shore's Lord of the Rings scores are some of my favorite film music ever.

title: John Williams
excerpt: His Star Wars work is foundational soundtrack music for me. I sung and hummed along to star wars music for so much of my childhood.

title: Lorien Testard
excerpt: The composer behind Expedition 33 and one of my favorite recent soundtrack discoveries. Gestral Summer Party, Lamplighter, and Monoco's Song are absolute fire, plus a bunch of other bangers across the OST.

title: Nobuo Uematsu
excerpt: A huge part of why Final Fantasy & Square music sticks with me. I especially love his classic SNES-PS1 Square-era work.

title: Phish
excerpt: Phish - The jam band of my youth. The next generation's grateful dead?

title: Pink Floyd
excerpt: One of my favorite bands. I've heard it described as Art Rock. My favorite song is Time.

title: Radiohead
excerpt: Radiohead is one of the bands I file under Art Rock because they keep mutating without losing identity. The catalog moves from guitar-driven records into electronic and experimental territory without feeling like trend-c...

title: String Cheese Incident
excerpt: An old high school friend's uncle is in this band, which always made them feel a little more personal to me. My favorite song is Good Times Around the Bend.
